rulings.Case Title: THOMAS TAYLOR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, February 2, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Defendant Metalclad's motion for summary judgment is denied. A trialable issue of fact exists regarding plaintiff's exposure to Unibestos, and defendant fails to shift the burden on the government contractor defense. Summary adjudication is denied as to negligence and strict liability. Summary adjudication is Granted as to false representation cause of action and claim for punitive damages. =(302/CWW/PB)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 583.310 And 583.360
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, February 2, 2009, line 2, DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 583.310 And 583.360. is granted. No opposition filed. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: LEON ALLEN VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BHC)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, February 2, 2009, line 3, DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for Summary Judgment denied as to negligence cause of action. Defendant failed to depose witness and failed to file supplemental brief by January 29, 2009, as ordered by the Court. =(302/CWW/VC)

rulings.Case Title: CLEOFE TUBERA LUCAS VS. AMERI OIL COMPANY, INC., et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement

AND AZAD AMIRI'S Motion For Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement IS OFF CALENDAR, MOVING PARTY HAS SET THIS MOTION FOR HEARING ON THE TRIAL DATE; PER SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 8.2(A)(2)(b), PARTIES MUST NOT NOTICE MOTIONS IN THE SAME CASE IN DIFFERENT DEPARTMENTS ON THE SAME DATE. =(302/CWW/VC)
